features: „ÄêCompatible a wide range of devices„Äë9000mAh capacity, no false claims, long-lasting battery life. „Äêsafe and reliable battery pack„Äë9000mAh Capacity with Remarkable. portable battery has 10 layers of multiple system protection, built-in low-temperature IC ice core, intelligent monitoring of voltage and current, actively avoid over-charge, over-discharge, short circuit, high temperature and a series of potential dangers, creating a safe charging environment for you.

„ÄêInput/output are fast charging„ÄëType-C (can be input/output), USB-A two interfaces, support a variety of mainstream fast charging protocol. Type-c input: 5V 3A, 9V 2.22A, 12V 1.67A; Type-C output: 5V 3A, 9V 2.22A; 12V 1.67A(20W max); USB-A output: 5V 3A, 9V 2.22A, 12V 1.67A (20W max).
